caption:
The @nyboatshow is back January 21st-January 25th at the Javits Center in New York City with all kinds of boats, a beach club, games, and so much more!

Use the link in my bio for 20% OFF TICKETS

The Discover Boating New York Boat Show

Location: Javits Center at 11th Avenue and 36th Street

Dates:
Jan 21st: 12-8pm
Jan 22nd: 12-8pm
Jan 23rd: 12-8pm
Jan 24th: 10am-8pm
Jan 25th: 10am-3pm***

@progressive @discoverboating 

#nyc #NewYork #travel #visitnyc #nybucketlist

transcription.text: Fun things to do in New York City for under $20. There's a giant event where you can explore multi-million dollar yachts, play free games, win prizes, eat incredible food, chill by the beach, and even enjoy a beverage while exploring some of the most unique boats in the world. This is the Discover Boating New York Boat Show.
